name: Social Conflict and Chutzpah
summary: Soziale Proben werden regel- und rollenspielbasiert aufgeloest.

mechanics.pc_vs_pc: No direct skill override; players must convince each other in roleplay.
mechanics.npc_resolution: GM can roll secretly and blend result with performance quality.
mechanics.robot_exception: Spurious Logic remains key channel versus bots/computers.
